Docs/MCP Server
SDK ReferenceAPI Reference
MCPv1.0.015 Tools

MCP Server Reference

Model Context Protocol server implementation for Agentix. Exposes agent management capabilities to AI providers like OpenClaude, LangChain, and other MCP-compatible runtimes.

Quick StartTransportAll ToolsIntegration

Quick Start

The simplest way to use MCP is via the HTTP direct call endpoint:

bash
# Register agent via MCP
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3001/mcp/call \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "register_agent",
    "arguments": {
      "orgId": 1,
      "agentType": "openclaude",
      "name": "My Agent",
      "endpoint": "http://localhost:8080"
    }
  }'

# Response
{
  "content": [{
    "type": "text",
    "text": "{\"success\":true,\"agent\":{\"id\":1,...}}"
  }]
}

Transport Modes

Agentix MCP supports three transport modes for different integration scenarios:

typescript
# HTTP Direct Call (simplest)
POST /mcp/call
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "name": "register_agent",
  "arguments": { ... }
}

# Server-Sent Events (full MCP transport)
GET /mcp/sse
Accept: text/event-stream

# Stdio (for CLI integration)
# Configure in MCP client settings
HTTP Direct
POST /mcp/call

Simple REST endpoint

SSE
GET /mcp/sse

Server-Sent Events

Stdio
Local CLI

Standard I/O

Available Tools

typescript
# List all available MCP tools
GET /mcp/tools

# Response
{
  "tools": [
    { "name": "register_agent", "description": "Register a new external AI agent" },
    { "name": "execute_action", "description": "Execute an action on an agent" },
    ...
  ],
  "serverInfo": {
    "name": "agentix",
    "version": "1.0.0"
  }
}

Tool Details

register_agent

Register a new external AI agent in the system.

Arguments
orgId:number*Organization ID
agentType:string*Agent provider type
name:string*Human-readable name
endpoint:stringAgent endpoint URL
metadata:objectAdditional metadata
execute_action

Execute an action on a registered agent.

Arguments
agentId:number*Agent ID
orgId:number*Organization ID
action:string*Action type
params:object*Action parameters
timeout:numberTimeout in ms
get_agent_state

Get full agent state including credentials, sessions, and wallets.

Arguments
agentId:number*Agent ID
orgId:number*Organization ID
create_session

Create an on-chain session with ZK proof.

Arguments
agentId:number*Agent ID
orgId:number*Organization ID
maxValue:stringMax tx value
expirySeconds:numberDuration (default: 3600)
list_agents

List all agents for an organization.

Arguments
orgId:number*Organization ID
status:stringFilter by status
limit:numberMax results (default: 50)
offset:numberPagination offset
update_agent

Update agent configuration.

Arguments
agentId:number*Agent ID
orgId:number*Organization ID
name:stringNew name
endpoint:stringNew endpoint
get_permissions

Get agent permission bitmask and capabilities.

Arguments
agentId:number*Agent ID
orgId:number*Organization ID
heartbeat

Send heartbeat to update agent status.

Arguments
agentId:number*Agent ID
orgId:number*Organization ID
status:stringStatus value

Execute Actions

Execute actions on registered agents with full parameter control:

typescript
# execute_action - Execute an action on a registered agent
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "execute_action",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,                // Required: Agent ID
    "orgId": 1,                  // Required: Organization ID
    "action": "read_file",       // Required: Action type
    "params": { "path": "..." }, // Required: Action parameters
    "timeout": 30000,            // Optional: Timeout in ms
    "credentialProof": { ... }   // Optional: ZK proof
  }
}

# Action types:
# read_file | write_file | execute_command | query
# api_call | sign_transaction | deploy_contract | custom

Session Management

typescript
# create_session - Create on-chain session with ZK proof
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "create_session",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1,
    "maxValue": "1000000000000000000",  // Optional: Max tx value
    "expirySeconds": 7200               // Optional: Duration (default 3600)
  }
}

# Response
{
  "session": {
    "sessionId": "session_0x...",
    "sessionKey": "0x...",
    "expiresAt": 1715624400
  },
  "zkProof": { ... }
}

Permissions

typescript
# get_permissions - Get agent permission bitmask
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "get_permissions",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1
  }
}

# Response
{
  "permissions": 255,
  "capabilities": [
    "read_file", "write_file", "execute_command",
    "query", "api_call", "sign_transaction",
    "deploy_contract", "custom"
  ]
}

Whitelist Management

typescript
# add_whitelist - Add contract to agent's whitelist
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "add_whitelist",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1,
    "address": "0xContractAddress...",
    "name": "USDC",              // Optional: Contract name
    "abi": "[{...}]"             // Optional: Contract ABI JSON
  }
}

# list_whitelist - List whitelisted contracts
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "list_whitelist",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1
  }
}

ZK Proofs

typescript
# generate_proof - Generate ZK authorization proof
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "generate_proof",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1,
    "action": "read_file",
    "expirySeconds": 3600
  }
}

# verify_proof - Verify a ZK proof
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "verify_proof",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1,
    "proof": { ... },
    "action": "read_file"
  }
}

Heartbeat

typescript
# heartbeat - Update agent status
POST /mcp/call
{
  "name": "heartbeat",
  "arguments": {
    "agentId": 1,
    "orgId": 1,
    "status": "running",    // connected | running | paused | error
    "metadata": { ... }     // Optional: Additional info
  }
}

Integration

OpenClaude CLI

Add this configuration to your MCP settings:

json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agentix": {
      "type": "sse",
      "url": "http://127.0.0.1:3001/mcp/sse"
    }
  }
}

Using curl

bash
# List available tools
curl http://127.0.0.1:3001/mcp/tools

# Register agent
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3001/mcp/call \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"register_agent","arguments":{"orgId":1,"agentType":"openclaude","name":"My Agent"}}'

# Execute action
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3001/mcp/call \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"execute_action","arguments":{"agentId":1,"orgId":1,"action":"read_file","params":{"path":"/data"}}}'

JavaScript/TypeScript

typescript
const response = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3001/mcp/call', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    name: 'register_agent',
    arguments: {
      orgId: 1,
      agentType: 'openclaude',
      name: 'My Agent'
    }
  })
})

const result = await response.json()
console.log(result.content[0].text)
